SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-18-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-18-2025 BY JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY, ALBERTO FAROL, SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DAVID GOMEZ. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE JOHN TRUE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ, DAVID $2,736.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,856.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,736.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
